title: Leave Policy Checker

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: Zara has flagged the leave checker before it goes to HR. Rahul can you walk us through what it should do?

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: Sure. The function checks if an employee can take leave. They can if their leave balance is enough to cover the days requested.

meeting_script.name: Sneha Kapoor
meeting_script.message: There is also a probation rule. New employees in their first 90 days cannot take any leave at all.

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: Right. And the maximum anyone can request in a single request is 5 days. We do not allow more than that at once.

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: The dev team already built a version. Your job is to find where it might give wrong answers. Head to your desk.

ai_prompt_shown: Write a function that checks if an employee can take leave.
